# AssignableDocument.Error.otherDocumentIsNotAVariant

**Case**

The other document to be merged into the current document is not a variant of the current document, so merge isn’t possible.

## Declaration

```swift
case otherDocumentIsNotAVariant
```

## Document errors

- **AssignableDocument.Error.invalidURL**: The URL provided cannot be converted into a new document.

items.description: The URL provided cannot be converted into a new document.
